response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with experience in event-driven architectures and scalable systems, as well as hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure. However, his background lacks direct fintech experience, especially in regulated environments like credit systems or payment flows. While he has led engineering teams, the scale and seniority required for a CTO role at a venture-backed fintech scale-up are not clearly demonstrated in his resume.
strengths: Extensive experience with event-driven architectures and distributed systems, relevant for agentic AI frameworks.
Hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, including MCP and agentic workflows.
Demonstrated ability to scale engineering teams and implement disciplined engineering practices (e.g., CI/CD, TDD).
concerns: No clear experience in fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit systems, payment flows, embedded finance) or regulated environments.
Lacks direct production experience with multi-agent AI systems in high-stakes commercial or financial contexts.
Limited evidence of scaling engineering organizations to 30+ people or developing senior technical-leadership layers.
